message:
feat(fwc): add RuntimeMode, RuntimeBoundary, and runtime truth boundary contract

Introduce RuntimeMode enum (Live, ExplicitOffline, DegradedOffline, Refused)
as the single resolved runtime state for every command invocation. Add
RuntimeContext for capturing CLI args + host availability, resolve_runtime_mode()
as the deterministic decision function, RuntimeBoundary for pre-computed
provenance/refusal data, and validate_mode_consistency() for debug assertions.

Key invariants enforced:
- No command resolves Live when host is absent
- LiveHost commands refuse --offline flag (no silent mode switch)
- Hybrid+FailFast commands require explicit --offline or live host
- Offline modes always produce provenance markers
- Every classified command × context resolves consistently

Adds 42 new tests covering mode properties, serde round-trips, resolution
for all command categories, boundary assembly, consistency validation,
and cross-cutting no-silent-fallback invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
